publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

item.desc: Note in red pencil concerning the content of the entire collection on of .

history.origin: The items originate largely from the environments of the Swedish Evangelical Mission to Eritrea, as indicated by a signature by on of . They were therefore produced at the end of the 19th or beginning of the 20th century.

msItem.title: History of ʾAlgaden
msItem.note:
Annotated by and edited in
VI, II, Tradizioni degli Algheden 71–73, as well as translated in 23–27.

msItem.title: Dǝgm ǧǝmʿ wad Galāydos mǝn ʿad Takles
msItem.incipit: ድግም፡ ጅምዕ፡ ወድ፡ ገላይዶስ፡ ምን፡ ዐድ፡ ተክሌስ።

supportDesc.foliation: Blank pages have been skipped from pagination. The pagination is continued in and ends up at 56.

item.desc: Annotations by on the first pages.

msItem.title: Dǝgm Bǝyḥo sab Badir
msItem.note: The text was edited in Enno Littmann, Publications of the Princeton Expedition to Abyssinia, vol. 1 - Tales, Customs ...: Tigre Text, Leiden 1910, no. 16; and translated in vol. 2 - Translations.

msItem.title: Dǝgm wǝrs salas ḥaw karā Maḥamad
msItem.incipit: ድግም፡ ውርስ፡ ሰለስ፡ ሐው፡ ከራ፡ መሐመድ።

supportDesc.foliation: Pagination continued from ending up in 56.

handNote.desc: Possibly identical or the same to .

item.q: Mando col tempo anche dei cantici et proverbi come III o IV quaderno

msItem.title: Dǝgm Mansāʿ
msItem.note: The text was amended by (e.g. ) and expanded by him to include pages (fol. 16r to 18r according to Strelcyn’s numbering in 150).

msItem.title: Table of contents of the following quire 5
msItem.note: Table of contents of the following quire (), presumably on (which is fol. 18r according to 150).

supportDesc.foliation: Paginated in blue pencil from 1 to 33.
supportDesc.collation: One folio (after page 28 and before page 29) is misplaced and can be found in .

msItem.title: Dǝgm Mansāʿ
msItem.note: The original text runs up to . The final chapter is written on , which was taken from and inserted in this place. It is entitled ድግም፡ ወለት፡ ሐጸይ፡ እት፡ ምድር፡ መንሳዕ፡ and comparable to fol. 17r (18r according to 150) of . The first eight lines of the front page () have been written by the hand of .

supportDesc.collation: One bifolium of unligned paper, smaller in size (210 x 135 mm), was added () to the notebook.

msItem.title: Proverbs and riddles
msItem.note: Notes in red ink by the hand of in the margins and interlinear spaces. Some of the proverbs and riddles are edited in 1–14, with a note on page 1, indicating that these texts were provided to him by the Swedish Mission to .

item.desc: Title of the first part in Italian
Note in Italian indicating the end of the text
item.q: Finis della piccola raccolta di proverbi

item.desc: Note in Italian on the content of the text
Note in Italian indicating the end of the text and the beginning of another
item.q: Finis delle enimme da noi raccolte. Segue un altro quaderno di cantici

msItem.title: Collection of 28 Tigre poems
msItem.note: Some of the poems are annotated by . Most of the poems have been edited in ; a German translation of which is published in and . However, the texts in this manuscript differ particularly in terms of spelling from those published by Littmann. Furthermore, Littmann’s edition sometimes includes prefaces to the poems that are missing from this manuscript.

msItem.title: ʾAmir wad Gabāh ʾǝgl Maḥamad wad Ǧāwǝǧ laḥalayā
msItem.incipit: አሚር፡ ወድ፡ ገባህ፡ እግል፡ መሐመድ፡ ወድ፡ ጃውጅ፡ ለሐለያ።

msItem.title: ʾAmir wad Gabāh ʾǝgl Kantebay Ǧāwǝǧ laḥalayā
msItem.incipit: አሚር፡ ወድ፡ ገባህ፡ እግል፡ ከንቴበይ፡ ጃውጅ፡ ለሐለያ።

msItem.title: Ḥǝlāyat Hǝbtes wad Nawradin (mǝn ʿad Takles)
msItem.incipit: ሕላየት፡ ህብቴስ፡ ወድ፡ ነውረዲን፡ ምን፡ ዐድ፡ ተክሌስ።

msItem.title: Ḥǝlāyat ʾƎyāsu wad Hǝbtes (mǝn ʿAd Hǝbtes)
msItem.incipit: ሕላየት፡ እያሱ፡ ወድ፡ ህብቴስ፡ ምን፡ ዐድ፡ ህብቴስ።

msItem.title: Wad Gǝrmit ʾǝgl ʾƎzāz wad Gamil laḥalayā ʿAd Taklesay
msItem.incipit: ወድ፡ ግርሚት፡ እግል፡ እዛዝ፡ ወድ፡ ጀሚል፡ ለሐለያ፡ ዐድ፡ ተክሌሰይ።

msItem.title: ʾƎzāz wad Ǧamil ʾǝgl Ḥazan laḥalayā
msItem.incipit: እዛዝ፡ ወድ፡ ጀሚል፡ እግል፡ ሐዘን፡ ለሐለያ።

msItem.title: ʾƎzāz wad Fǝdel laḥalayā ʾǝgl Mansāʿ kaʾafo kǝm ʿalat
msItem.incipit: እዛዝ፡ ወድ፡ ፍዴል፡ ለሐለያ፡ እግል፡ መንሳዕ፡ ከአፎ፡ ክም፡ ዐለት።

msItem.title: ʾElos wad Tedros betǧukay dib sanḥit laḥalayā
msItem.incipit: ኤሎስ፡ ወድ፡ ቴድሮስ፡ ቤትጁከይ፡ ዲብ፡ ሰንሒት፡ ለሐለያ።

msItem.title: ʿƎmrān wad Karam Bazzǝḥ ʾǝgl Ǧahāǧ waǧ ʿAggabā labellā
msItem.note: Edited in 75, where the title is inscribed as ዕምራን፡ ወድ፡ ከረም፡ በዝሕ፡ እግል፡ ጀሃድ፡ ወድ፡ ዐገባ፡ ለቤላ።.
msItem.incipit: ዕምራን፡ ወድ፡ ከረም–በዝሕ። እግል፡ ጀሃጅ፡ ወጅ፡ ዐገባ፡ ለቤላ።

msItem.title: ʿƎmrān wad Karam Bazzǝḥ ʾǝgl Ǧahāǧ waǧ ʿAggabā labellā
msItem.note: Edited in 76, where the title is inscribed as ዕምራን፡ ወድ፡ ከረም፡ በዝሕ፡ እግል፡ ጀሃድ፡ ወድ፡ ዐገባ፡ ሀዬ፡ ለቤላ።.
msItem.incipit: ዕምራን፡ ወድ፡ ከረም፡ በዝሕ፡ እግል፡ ጀሃጅ፡ ወጅ፡ ዐገባ፡ ለቤላ።

msItem.title: ʿƎmrān wad Karam Bazzǝḥ ʾǝgl Ǧahāǧ waǧ ʿAggabā labellā
msItem.note: Edited in 77, where the title is inscribed as ዕምራን፡ ወድ፡ ከረም፡ በዝሕ፡ እግል፡ ጀሃድ፡ ወድ፡ ዐገባ፡ ሀዬ፡ ለቤላ።.
msItem.incipit: ዕምራን፡ ወድ፡ ከረም፡ በዝሕ፡ እግል፡ ጀሃጅ፡ ወጅ፡ ዐገባ፡ ለቤላ።

msItem.title: ʿƎmrān wad Karam Bazzǝḥ ʾǝgl Ǧahāǧ waǧ ʿAggabā labellā
msItem.note: Edited in 78, where the title is inscribed as ዕምራን፡ ወድ፡ ከረም፡ በዝሕ፡ እግል፡ ጀሃድ፡ ወድ፡ ዐገባ፡ ሀዬ፡ ለቤላ።.
msItem.incipit: ዕምራን፡ ወድ፡ ከረም፡ በዝሕ፡ እግል፡ ጀሃጅ፡ ወጅ፡ ዐገባ፡ ለቤላ።

msItem.title: ʿƎmrān wad Karam Bazzǝḥ ʾǝgl ʿAd Tasfāč̣on labellā
msItem.incipit: ዕምራን፡ ወድ፡ ከረም፡ በዝሕ፡ እግል፡ ዐድ፡ ተስፋጮን፡ ለቤላ።

msItem.title: ʿƎmrān wad Karam Bazzǝḥ ʾǝt badā ʾazān tagarit Mansāʿ wamot sab gǝdri labellā
msItem.incipit: ዕምራን፡ ወድ፡ ከረም፡ በዝሕ፡ እት፡ በዳ፡ አዛን፡ ተገሪት፡ መንሳዕ፡ ወሞት፡ ሰብ፡ ግድሪ፡ ለቤላ።

msItem.title: ʿƎmrān wad Karam Bazzǝḥ ʾaḥa ʿAtmāryām ʾet mǝdr Mansāʿ mǝn ʿerat labellā
msItem.note: Edited in 81, where the people are indicated as ዐድ–ትማርያም፡.
msItem.incipit: ዕምራን፡ ወድ፡ ከረም፡ በዝሕ፡ አሐ፡ ዐትማርያም፡ እት፡ ምድር፡ መንሳዕ፡ ምን፡ ዔረት፡ ለቤላ።

msItem.title: ʿƎmrān wad Karam Bazzǝḥ ʾǝgl rorā ʾAgʿara labellā
msItem.note: Edited in 83, where the land is called ሮራ፡ አግዐሮ፡.
msItem.incipit: ዕምራን፡ ወድ፡ ከረም፡ በዝሕ፡ እግል፡ ሮራ፡ አግዐረ፡ ለቤላ።

msItem.title: ʿƎmrān wad Karam Bazzǝḥ ʾǝt zamāte ʾAgʿaro waʾǝtā ʾǝt lamotaw sab labellā
msItem.incipit: ዕምራን፡ ወድ፡ ከረም፡ በዝሕ፡ እት፡ ዘማቴ፡ አግዐሮ፡ ወእታ፡ እት፡ ለሞተው፡ ሰብ፡ ለቤላ።

msItem.title: ʾAwʿalā wad Maḥamud ʾǝgl Ǧahād wad ʿAggabā labellā
msItem.incipit: አውዐላ፡ ወድ፡ መሐሙድ፡ እግል፡ ጀሃድ፡ ወድ፡ ዐገባ፡ ለቤላ።

msItem.title: ʾAwʿalā wad Maḥamud ʾǝgl Kantebay Tedros wa-Kantebay Bǝʾǝmnat labellā
msItem.incipit: አውዐላ፡ ወድ፡ መሐሙድ፡ እግል፡ ከንቴበይ፡ ቴድሮስ፡ ወከንቴበይ፡ ብእምነት፡ ለቤላ።

supportDesc.condition: The quire shows signs of scorching.

msItem.title: ʿAd ʾǝt qabat gazirat
msItem.incipit: ዐድ፡ እት፡ ቀበት፡ ገዚረት፡ ዐላ፡ ወሹሙ፡ ጀር፡ ልቡሉ፡ ወእሊ፡ ሹም፡ እግላ፡ ዐድ፡ እትሕድ፡ ሐዘዩ፡ ወበረዩ፡ ወህቱ፡ ክእና፡ ክምወዳ፡ ሐየት፡ ወአልማ፡ ሀዬ፡ ትሰለጠውውቱ።

msItem.title: History of the prophet Salomon
msItem.note: Written by the hand of and edited and translated in 17–20.

supportDesc.condition: The quire exhibits significant signs of burning.

msItem.title: Tigre poems with Amharic translations
msItem.note: The left column on each page contain the Tigre text of each poem, while the right provides an Amharic translation. Except for , the poems are not included in .

supportDesc.foliation: paginated in Ethiopian numbers (from ፩ to ፭).
supportDesc.condition: The quire is severely damaged by fire with partial text losses on the left side at the bottom of ; are completely or partly destroyed.

revisionDesc.change: Updated after reviews by Magdalena Krzyżanowska and Elizaveta Shvartz
